status: domain/public launch prep; sitemap cleaned; service pages noindexed; deploy markdown removed; 10-region layer retained
notes: v60 is a full release package, not a small hotfix.
Canonical and OG base remains GitHub Pages until the final domain is chosen.
After domain selection, replace canonical/og:url and robots sitemap base in one sweep, then regenerate sitemap.xml.
Root Markdown release notes/checklists were removed from the deployable archive to reduce public service surface.
version.html and deployment-check.html stay available for manual deploy checks but are marked noindex and excluded from sitemap.xml.
The public 10-region layer is preserved across purchase, soil, calendar, first-garden, do-not-buy and garden-health-check pages.
